scenarios.name: Pricing Lift
scenarios.predixenQuery: What if we raise prices by 6% starting month 2?

scenarios.name: Churn Shock + Recovery
scenarios.predixenQuery: What if revenue drops 5% for 3 months due to churn then recovers?

scenarios.name: Enterprise Push
scenarios.description: ARPA +12%, opex +15%, revenue ramp delayed 2 months
scenarios.expectedDirection: short-term burn increase, long-term revenue lift
scenarios.predixenQuery: What if we shift to enterprise with 12% higher prices but 15% more sales cost and 2 month delay?

scenarios.name: AI Add-on Launch
scenarios.description: Revenue +4% from month 4, Payroll +6% from month 1
scenarios.expectedDirection: initial burn increase, revenue lift later
scenarios.predixenQuery: What if we launch an AI add-on: payroll +6% immediately, revenue +4% starting month 4?

scenarios.name: Cost Optimization
scenarios.predixenQuery: What if we cut payroll by 5% starting month 2?

scenarios.name: Geo Expansion (US/APAC)
scenarios.expectedDirection: burn spike then recovery with higher revenue
scenarios.predixenQuery: What if we expand to US/APAC: opex +20% for 6 months, then revenue +10% from month 7?

scenarios.name: Mixed Stacked + Reset
scenarios.description: Apply S1+S4+S6, then reset and verify baseline returns
scenarios.expectedDirection: complex interaction, then exact baseline restoration
scenarios.predixenQuery: What if we raise prices 6%, launch AI add-on, and expand geographically?
